02 · June

Happy Birthday

Aishwariya

scroll

all the reasons

Why We Love You, Aishie

ONE

Her Light

She walks in, and the room knows. The kind of warmth you don't have to look for.

TWO

Her Heart

Generous without keeping score. Kind without being asked. The quiet kind of love that just shows up.

THREE

Her Laughter

The sound the whole table leans toward. The reason ordinary evenings become stories worth retelling.

FOUR

Her Spirit

Curious, brave, soft in all the places that matter. Always becoming. Always herself.

02 · JUNE

This Day

Another trip around the sun for the person who makes ours a little brighter. Happy birthday, Aishie.

wishes for the year ahead

A Jar of Wishes

My darling, my heart. You are the warmth in our home and the song in our days. May this year hold you as gently as I always have. — Maa ♡
To my brave girl — quietly proud of every step you've taken, and the ones still ahead. Wishing you a year as bright as your spirit. — Papa ✦
May this birthday bring blessings as wide as the sky and as steady as the people who love you. We're all rooting for you, beta. — Bua & Fufa ✺
From the bhaiya who has watched you grow into someone our family adores — may this year be everything you deserve, and a little more. — Kartavya bhaiya ✦
To my sister, my first friend, my forever cheer squad — happy birthday. May every dream you whisper come back home as truth. — Hema didi ❀
Another year of you — the world is a softer, sweeter place because you're in it. Love you always, Aishie. — Nayanka didi ✿
Happy birthday to one of the kindest hearts I know. Wishing you a year of laughter, light, and very little drama. — Flower bhaiya ❀
Equal parts wonderful and impossible — and we wouldn't trade you for the world. Happy birthday, Aishie. — Bagga ✦
Happy birthday, Aishie! You're our favourite person to play with. Please bring chocolate when you come visit. — Siddharth & Ekansh ✿
My laadli — may you live long and laugh often, and may every blessing this year carries find its way to your door. Dadi loves you forever. — Dadi ❁

✦

यह ख़त तुम्हारे लिए है

Aishie,

✦   ✦   ✦

तेरी आँखों में है उम्मीद का नूर,
तेरी राहों से हो हर ग़म दूर।

तेरी हँसी से रोशन है यह जहाँ,
तेरे होने से महके सारा आसमाँ।

दुआओं का आँचल है तुझ पर,
आशीषों की बरखा है तुझ पर।

ज़िंदगी तुम्हारी हो बहार-ओ-रंग,
जन्मदिन मुबारक — हम हैं तेरे संग।

❀

— सबकी दुआओं से ♥

with all our love ♥
